prose.en: Implement information search and retrieval services that enforce {param:ac-21.02_odp}.

guidance.en: Information search and retrieval services identify information system resources relevant to an information need.

prose.en: information search and retrieval services that enforce {param:ac-21.02_odp} are implemented.

objects.en: procedures addressing user-based collaboration and information sharing (including restrictions)
system configuration settings and associated documentation
system-generated list of access restrictions regarding information to be shared
Organizational personnel with access enforcement responsibilities for system search and retrieval services
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
System search and retrieval services enforcing information-sharing restrictions

guidelines.en: information-sharing restrictions to be enforced by information search and retrieval services are defined;
